description: Advanced MTG Manabase Analyzer — privacy-first React SPA with Karsten hypergeometric math, Monte Carlo + Bellman mulligan, K=3 ramp engine, and a curated Competitive MTG Library (48+ articles + per-article SEO + exports).

stack.state: Redux Toolkit + Redux Persist v1 schema
stack.observability: Sentry code present, DSN INTENTIONALLY UNSET in prod (privacy claim)

currentState.versionEffective: v2.7.1 (HANDOFF 2026-04-19 Library filter UX tester loop)
currentState.workingTree: clean (no uncommitted changes at session start)

routes./mathematics: MathematicsPage — Karsten / hypergeom / Bellman / Monte Carlo plain-English
routes./library: ReferenceArticlesPage — 48 articles, 5 tracks, search, filters, progress

topLevelDirs: components/ — analyzer, analysis, common, export, layout, library, performance
hooks/ — useLibraryProgress, usePrivacyStorage, useCardImage, useAdvancedAnalysis, useManaCalculations, useWebWorker
pages/ — 9 pages (HomePage, AnalyzerPage, ReferenceArticlesPage, ArticleDetailPage, AuthorPage, GuidePage, MathematicsPage, LandGlossaryPage, MyAnalysesPage)

services/ — deckAnalyzer, manaCalculator, castability/{hypergeom,acceleratedAnalyticEngine}, manaProducerService, mulliganSimulator, mulliganSimulatorAdvanced, advancedMaths, scryfall, landService, landCacheService
store/ — Redux Toolkit + persist v1 (analyzer slice only whitelisted)
types/ — index, lands, maths, manaProducers, referenceArticle, scryfall
utils/ — libraryHelpers (NEW v2.7.0), landDetection*, hybridLandDetection, intelligentLandAnalysis, manabase

primaryPage.purpose: Library V3 — hero, search, TOC card-tiles, segmented filter panel, track sections, browse grid, feedback CTA, JSON-LD ItemList of ALL 48 articles
warnings: 800L → 1678L now — candidate for v2.8 split: LibraryHero, LibraryFilters, LibraryTrackSection, LibraryBrowseSection, buildLibraryJsonLd
URL filter sentinels (cat, level, lang, medium, q) are external-link-stable — do NOT rename without redirect

perArticlePage.purpose: NEW v2.7.0 — per-article SEO page with JSON-LD Article schema

authorPage.purpose: NEW v2.7.0 — per-author index (links from ArticleCard + library search)

components: /src/components/library/TrackHeader.tsx — accent color per track (Commander forced to #6B3FA0 purple, NOT canonical black)

data.articleCount: 48 articles across 5 CuratorTracks: first-fnm, rcq, pro-tour, commander, limited
data.testInvariants: /src/data/__tests__/articlesReferenceSeed.test.ts — unique IDs, valid http(s) URLs, archived→originalUrl, each track has ≥1 non-English OR rescued pick

hooks.purpose: Privacy-first localStorage (key: manatuner-library-progress-v1), cross-tab sync via storage event. DO NOT add network layer.

utils.purpose: Shared helpers for Library V3 (article normalization, filter URL state)

warnings: Each of the 5 tabs wrapped in own <ErrorBoundary label=...> for crash isolation + Sentry tag
Currently IGNORES ?format=commander query param — CTA captures intent but Analyzer doesn't consume it yet (known P1 open)

supporting: /src/components/ManaCostRow.tsx — 1067L, dual probability path: useProbabilityCalculation (inline hypergeom, lands only) + useAcceleratedCastability (K=3 engine). SSOT alignment TODO open.

hypergeom.purpose: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH. Log-space PMF/atLeast. Dynamic Float64Array capacity (warm-start n=200, geometric 1.5× growth via ensureCapacity). NaN safety: clampProbability(x), every entry point validates Number.isFinite.

manaCalculator.purpose: Tempo-aware probability, Karsten table lookup, landProducesColorForSpell (creature-only mana like Cavern of Souls), calculateTempoAwareProbability, analyzeSpellCastability

acceleratedEngine.purpose: K=0/1/2/3 triple-producer scenarios online. ENHANCER + 2 dorks supported. clamp01(x) guards. Handles dorks, rocks, treasures, rituals, one-shots, land-ramp, aura-land, land-from-hand, spawn, landfall, doubler (5 new types 2026-04-10).

mathsEngine.advancedMaths: /src/services/advancedMaths.ts — AdvancedMathEngine wrapper with cache + Monte Carlo + multivariate
mulligan: /src/services/mulliganSimulatorAdvanced.ts — archetype-aware (line 922-941 has Bellman backward induction, threshold derivation). Do NOT modify without understanding recursion.

keyFunctions: cleanCardName (line 703-723) — SINGLE source of truth for name normalization: unicode → Arena markers (CMDR/F/E/CMP) → MTGA (SET) 123 → A- prefix → // split-to-front
detectSideboardStartLine — smart auto-detect: explicit markers + inline 'SB:' prefix + blank-line heuristic (40-100 main / 1-15 side)
Scryfall resilience (line 225-275): 8s AbortController timeout, 1 retry w/ 400ms backoff on 429/5xx, exact= → fuzzy= fallback
isCreature populated from Scryfall type_line (feeds creature-only mana)

scryfall.purpose: LRU-BOUNDED caches: cardCache 500 entries, collectionCache 100 entries. BoundedMap<K,V> extends Map. Never replace with plain new Map() — long sessions OOM.

maths.purpose: Karsten tables SSOT (symbols × turn → sources, T1–T10). getKarstenSources() helper.

types.manaProducers: /src/types/manaProducers.ts — 5 new types added 2026-04-10: LAND_AURA, LAND_FROM_HAND, SPAWN_SCION, LANDFALL_MANA, MANA_DOUBLER + existing ENHANCER (2026-04-06)
types.referenceArticle: /src/types/referenceArticle.ts — CuratorTrack union: first-fnm | rcq | pro-tour | commander | limited

store.config: version:1 persist schema, whitelist=['analyzer'] only, createTransform strips {snackbar, isAnalyzing} from rehydrated state, createMigrate handles pre-v2.2 corruption. MUST bump to version:2 + migrations[2] for any analyzer slice shape change.

removed: /src/hooks/useAnalysisStorage.ts — DELETED in v2.5.2. Legacy 'manatuner-analyses' key migration now handled by PrivacyStorage.getMyAnalyses() on first read. DO NOT RECREATE.
inlinedInComponents: useProbabilityCalculation (inside ManaCostRow.tsx, line 308) — inline hypergeom, lands-only. Not hoisted to SSOT yet.
useAcceleratedCastability — K=3 engine path inside ManaCostRow

knownTODOs_knownFrictionPoints.issue: useProbabilityCalculation still uses inline hypergeom (lands-only) — NOT aligned with calculateTempoAwareProbability SSOT engine. Open since v2.5.1 (2026-04-12), re-confirmed at v2.5.2, v2.5.4, and the 2026-04-17 audit. Carrying into v2.7.1.

1678 lines (was 800L at v2.6.0 — grew +100 % in 2 weeks). Mixes SEO/JSON-LD, hero, search, filter toolbar, track loops, category loops, progress footer, feedback CTA. Split candidates (deferred to v2.8): LibraryHero / LibraryFilters / LibraryTrackSection / LibraryBrowseSection / buildLibraryJsonLd pure function.

Commander track CTA routes to /analyzer?format=commander but Analyzer currently IGNORES the query param. Intent captured for future EDH preset (n=100, singleton, T5–T8 horizon). Commander users clicking CTA land on a 60-card-defaulted Analyzer — honest placeholder but leaks intent.
Filter keys {cat, level, lang, medium, q} are external-link-stable. Renaming breaks Discord-pasted deep links. Redirect required before any rename.
Commander accent color is MTG canonical black (#150B00) in the color system but overridden to purple (#6B3FA0) for dark-theme readability. Do NOT revert to canonical black.

Hero copy must use 'from Karsten's manabase math to Saito's tournament mindset' (both HoF competitive names). Do NOT revert to 'Commander Bracket System' — category error (Commander is casual/multiplayer).

locations: MulliganTab.tsx (unused isMobile prop, missing useEffect deps)

nonNegotiableConstraints.rule: Supabase REMOVED 2026-04-13. ManaTuner is 100 % localStorage / privacy-first. Do NOT reintroduce a backend without re-opening the decision with the creator.

Sentry code integrated (src/main.tsx:13-26, ErrorBoundary.tsx:35-49) but Sentry.init() gated on import.meta.env.PROD && VITE_SENTRY_DSN. VITE_SENTRY_DSN MUST remain UNSET in Vercel prod to preserve PrivacySettings.tsx:204 promise ('Nothing is sent to any server'). Re-enabling requires 4 prerequisites in order: (1) beforeSend scrubber, (2) PrivacySettings disclaimer update, (3) opt-out toggle for EU/GDPR, (4) CSP verification.

Header Library button + HomePage 'Browse the Library' are INTENTIONALLY primary-tier (solid #0E68AB → #6A1B9A gradient, NOT 35 %-opacity). Two primary CTAs exist: Analyzer (gold = action) + Library (blue→purple = knowledge). Keep visually distinct — do NOT harmonize to a single color. User memory flag: 'Do not demote.'
useLibraryProgress, privacy.ts, and any storage layer must use localStorage only. No network persistence without re-opening the decision.

src/services/castability/hypergeom.ts is the ONE source of truth for log-space PMF/atLeast. Do NOT hardcode maxN — always call pmf/atLeast and trust dynamic growth. Never add a probability entry point without Number.isFinite + clamp guard.
src/services/deckAnalyzer.ts:703-723 cleanCardName is SSOT for name normalization. Do NOT bypass when adding new parser path. Scryfall query order: exact= first, fuzzy= fallback.
Scryfall in-memory caches use BoundedMap (cardCache 500 / collectionCache 100). Do NOT replace with plain new Map() — long sessions (Cube grinders) would OOM.
store/index.ts uses version:1 + createMigrate. Any analyzer slice shape change must bump to version:2 and add migrations[2] handler.

articlesReferenceSeed.test.ts enforces: ≥30 articles, unique IDs, valid http(s) primaryUrl, archived/mirror carries originalUrl, tracked articles carry curatorNote, tracks 3-10 articles each, each track has ≥1 non-English OR rescued pick. New tracks must satisfy last two.
/library JSON-LD ItemList MUST expose all 48 articles. Do NOT reintroduce slice(0, 10) — every article is long-tail SEO bait.
Every shuffle in codebase uses backward Fisher-Yates pattern. NEVER use .sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5) — biased.
.claude/hooks/play-tts.sh returns muted in this project but the hook MUST fire at action start + completion per AgentVibes protocol.
